case_title: CALIFORNIA IVY INC. A CORP. vs. KAYE, MALCOLM et al

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA IVY INC. A CORP.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA IVY INC. A CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT KAYE, MALCOLM FIRST DOE SECOND DOE THIRD DOE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-10-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-12-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-23-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-05-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-05-1996, OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AS TO WHY NO BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT WAS FILED. HEARING SET FOR FEB-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-04-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-04-1995, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED OR OTHER APPROPRIATE ACTION TAKEN. OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-07-1995, CONTINUED TO JAN-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT; CASE WILL REMAIN ON CALENDAR UNTIL A DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT IS ENTERED. PLEASE SUBMIT A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO 1/5/96 TO INFORM THE COURT OF THE CURRENT STATUS OF CASE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
